stepsCompleted.docNote: Added Kanban task board page at /tasks with 3-column layout (TODO/IN_PROGRESS/DONE), HTML5 native drag-and-drop between columns with optimistic UI, fallback status-transition buttons (Start/Done/Back to To Do/Reopen), and Task Board nav link in NavBar. E2E tests cover create→drag→persist and button fallback flows.

Added fn-tasks.ts with 3 HTTP triggers (GET/POST/PATCH) for Kanban task CRUD against Cosmos DB Tasks container. Uses DefaultAzureCredential, enforces MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE=500 via 429. Added @azure/cosmos + @azure/identity deps (were missing from webhook-dispatcher merge). Integration tests validate CRUD flow + az CLI appsettings check.

Dead code analysis complete. No dead code found to remove. All feature symbols (fn-tasks.ts: 7 symbols, page.tsx: 8 symbols, tasks.ts: 8 symbols) are actively used. CreateTask/UpdateTaskStatus types in packages/schemas have zero AST consumers but are protected shared-schema public API exports. All tests green (39 backend, 60 frontend).
